creator: psawicki00@gmail.com
text: Hi . Making  "XFCE Settings > Keyboard > Application Shortcuts" and for additional changing keyboard type from 105 keys to 104 to/and back - helps , but only for one current session.  Up arrow / keyboard works no problem on console text mode , even under x11, using session  'freerdp' to windows host up arrow key is okey there . Also up-arrow key on the numeric keypad is working ( backup solution ) but it have different meaning with the shit key , and this one is physically apart from up/down left/right 4 keys used primary.
